title: gh-stack file
description: Schema for the .git/gh-stack file that stores the state of all stacks in a repository.

stacks.description: All stacks tracked in this repository.

id.description: Identifier for this stack, populated from the API when available.

prefix.description: Branch name prefix for the stack (e.g. 'myfeature').

numbered.description: Whether to use auto-incrementing numbered branch names.

trunk.description: The trunk (base) branch of the stack.

branches.description: Ordered list of branches in the stack, from bottom to top.

branchRef.description: A reference to a branch and its associated commit hash. For the trunk, 'head' stores the HEAD commit. For stacked branches, 'base' stores the parent branch's HEAD SHA at the time of last sync/rebase.

head.description: The HEAD commit SHA of this branch. Used for the trunk branch.

base.description: The parent branch's HEAD SHA at the time of last sync/rebase. Used to identify which commits are unique to this branch.

pullRequest.description: Associated pull request information, if a PR exists for this branch.

pullRequestRef.description: A snapshot of pull request metadata.

number.description: The PR number, scoped to the repository.

url.description: Direct URL to the pull request.

merged.description: Whether the pull request has been merged.
